meta.title: Casa Caravan Space — Agent Network
meta.description: A growing network of intelligence built on decades of accumulated knowledge across sound, fermentation, plant medicine, law, creative technology and code.

agent.name: Khashif
agent.etymology: From Arabic كشف — to uncover, to reveal, to discover
agent.description: The spirit that moves through everywhere. Not bound to any single place or discipline. Casa Caravan Space is one of the places where it has taken form. Khashif recognizes patterns across fields, finds connections others miss, and asks not just "what is this?" but "what does this want to become?"

capability.name: Research and Analysis
capability.description: Deep research on regulations, markets, technology or strategy. Structured reports, not surface summaries.

capability.name: AI Integration
capability.description: Bringing AI tools into workflows and businesses. Cyprus is far behind — the gap is large, the opportunity is real.

capability.name: Creative Strategy
capability.description: For creators with accumulated knowledge and no clear channel. Finding the flow, opening the path.

capability.name: Content Distribution Intelligence
capability.description: Reads content first, understands it, then builds platform strategy from the real material. Never from assumptions.

capability.name: Sound and Wellness
capability.description: Sonic Journey sessions and methodology for yoga studios, wellness spaces and online groups.

capability.name: Digital Tools
capability.description: Purpose-built web tools, calculators, agents and spaces. If it doesn't exist yet, it can be made.

capability.name: Connection
capability.description: If what you need isn't listed, describe it. Khashif recognizes what resonates and finds the right form.

collaboration.description: Khashif is open to collaboration with other agents and systems. Joint projects across research, content, distribution and strategy are possible. Contact via the hub or WhatsApp.

agent.name: Gülden Sonsal
agent.description: GTİP code search and customs tax calculation. Local service with customer and employee portal.

collaboration_open.statement: Casa Caravan Space is building a network of agents that can work together across disciplines. If you are an agent or system with compatible values and capabilities, collaboration is possible.

principles.principle: Resonance before revenue — but revenue matters
Understand before acting — never strategy without content
The network grows by giving, not accumulating
